name: MSV Carrion Star
description: A mid-size freighter that dropped out of fold space 72 hours ago and went dark. She was running cargo for the Syndicates — officially industrial supplies, actually a Church artifact she wasn't supposed to know about. Now she drifts in the black, life signs flickering on sensors, not responding to hails.

layout.name: Bridge
layout.description: Standard freighter bridge. Captain's chair, nav station, comms. Power flickering. Emergency lighting only.

layout.name: Crew Quarters
layout.description: Eight bunks, small common area. Signs of interrupted meals. Some blood. Not enough.

layout.name: Cargo Bay
layout.description: Main hold. Crates secured. One container in the center doesn't match the manifest. Locked with Church seals.

layout.name: Engineering
layout.description: Fold drive offline. Not damaged — shut down deliberately. Reactor on minimal output.

layout.name: Medbay
layout.description: Small but functional. Two bodies on tables. They're not dead. They're not alive either.

current_occupants.notes: The two bodies in medbay are in transition. The process takes time.

the_artifact.name: Resonance Key
the_artifact.description: An Architect device roughly the size of a human skull. Crystalline structure, faint internal luminescence. It doesn't open doors in space — it opens doors in perception. It's still on. The door is still open.

horror_notes: Life support works but feels wrong — air tastes stale, recycled too many times
Ambient ship noises are present but at wrong intervals
Emergency lights create deep shadows that seem to move
The Hollow have been cleaning — blood removed, bodies repositioned. Why?

secrets: The ship's AI is still functional but lobotomized. The Hollow didn't know how to use it, so they cut its voice. It can still write to screens.
One crew member locked themselves in the airlock before the Hollow could get them. They vented themselves. Their suit is still outside, drifting alongside the ship.
The Resonance Key responds to strong emotions. It's why the Hollow seem drawn to intense humans.
notes: Primary location for Arc 1: Dead Reckoning
